EXHIBIT 99.1

 Asanko Gold Inc. - Exhibit 99.1 - Filed by newsfilecorp.com
 

ASANKO GOLD RESULTS OF ANNUAL GENERAL MEETING

Vancouver, British Columbia, June 12, 2017 – Asanko Gold
Inc. (“Asanko” or the “Company”) (TSX, NYSE MKT: AKG) announced that all the
resolutions put to shareholders at the Company’s annual general and special
meeting (the “Meeting”) held on June 9, 2017 were duly passed. The results for
each of the matters voted upon at the Meeting are set out below: 
Election of Directors The seven nominees listed in
the Company’s management information circular dated April 28 2017, were elected
at the Meeting as directors of Asanko.

EX-99.1 2 exhibit99-1.htm EXHIBIT 99.1 Asanko Gold Inc. - Exhibit 99.1 - Filed by newsfilecorp.com

ASANKO GOLD RESULTS OF ANNUAL GENERAL MEETING

Vancouver, British Columbia, June 12, 2017 – Asanko Gold Inc. (“Asanko” or the “Company”) (TSX, NYSE MKT: AKG) announced that all the resolutions put to shareholders at the Company’s annual general and special meeting (the “Meeting”) held on June 9, 2017 were duly passed. The results for each of the matters voted upon at the Meeting are set out below:

Election of Directors
The seven nominees listed in the Company’s management information circular dated April 28 2017, were elected at the Meeting as directors of Asanko.

Director Name
Votes For
% Votes For
Votes Withheld
% Votes Withheld
Colin Steyn 138,065,951 99.89% 148,900 0.11%
Peter Breese 135,590,112 98.10% 2,624,739 1.90%
Gordon Fretwell 134,868,925 97.58% 3,345,926 2.42%
Marcel de Groot 135,244,864 97.85% 2,969,987 2.15%
Michael Price 138,062,306 99.89% 152,545 0.11%
William Smart 135,259,540 97.86% 2,955,311 2.14%
Shawn Wallace 134,965,847 97.65% 3,249,004 2.35%
